summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of WebDesignFLA static marketing site redesign. Tested all 6 routes (with and without trailing slashes), backend APIs, navigation, phone CTAs, content presence, SEO meta tags, responsive design, and verified NO contact forms exist anywhere. Backend: 6/6 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 40+ tests passed with 2 minor issues (tablet horizontal scroll and portfolio image loading from external source).

design_issues.issue: Horizontal scroll detected at 768x1024 viewport (17px excess width)
design_issues.details: All elements are 785px wide instead of 768px at tablet viewport. Mobile (390px), Desktop (1280px), and Large Desktop (1920px) work perfectly with no horizontal scroll.

design_issues.issue: Only 17 out of 28 portfolio images loaded successfully (expected 20+)
design_issues.details: Images are pulled from www.webdesignfla.com via referrerPolicy=no-referrer. Some images may be slow to load or blocked. This is expected behavior for external images and not a critical issue. All 28 portfolio cards render correctly with fallback styling.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/health returns 200 with correct status and service name
Backend: /api/sitemap.xml returns 200 with all 6 routes
Backend: /api/robots.txt returns 200 with sitemap reference
Backend: /api/ root endpoint returns 200
Backend: /api/status GET returns 200
Backend: /api/status POST creates status check with id, client_name, timestamp
All 6 routes load correctly with trailing slash (/, /web-design/, /seo/, /social/, /portfolio/, /privacy-policy/)
All 5 routes load correctly without trailing slash (/web-design, /seo, /social, /portfolio, /privacy-policy)
404 page renders for unknown routes
Header navigation: All 5 nav links present and functional (Home, Web Design, SEO, Social Media, Portfolio)
Header phone CTA: href=tel:+15614646222 and displays (561) 464-6222
Mobile menu: Hamburger button opens sheet with nav links and phone CTA (href=tel:+15614646222)
Footer: Phone link (tel:+15614646222), email (mailto:admin@webdesignfla.com), address (103 South U.S. Hwy 1, Jupiter, FL 33477), and privacy link all present
Home hero: Contains 'premium' and 'convert' wording
Home hero: Primary call CTA (tel:+15614646222) and View Portfolio button present
Home stats: Counters animate to 639 (Satisfied Clients) and 303 (Active Clients)
Home services: 3 service cards link to /web-design/, /seo/, /social/
Home portfolio preview: 9 cards displayed with 'View all' link to /portfolio/
Portfolio page: 28 project cards displayed in grid
Web Design page: All 8 inclusions present (DNS Transfer, WordPress Installation, Database Set-up, Email Set-up, Hosting, SEO, Search Engine Submissions, Social Media Links)
SEO page: Internal and External SEO sections present
SEO page: Traffic chart (data-testid=seo-traffic-example-chart) renders
SEO page: FAQ accordion present and functional
Social page: All channels present (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn)
Privacy Policy page: data-testid=privacy-policy-page exists
Privacy Policy page: All 9 numbered sections present
NO <form> tags exist on any page (Home, Web Design, SEO, Social, Portfolio, Privacy Policy)
NO contact form input fields exist anywhere
NO submit buttons exist anywhere

Every page has unique <title> tag (Home: #1 Website Design, Web Design: Website Design Services, SEO: SEO Services, Social: Social Media Marketing, Portfolio: Portfolio, Privacy Policy: Privacy Policy)
Every page has unique meta description
Every page has canonical link tag
Responsive: Mobile (390x844) - no horizontal scroll
Responsive: Desktop (1280x1080) - no horizontal scroll
Responsive: Large Desktop (1920x1080) - no horizontal scroll
Sticky header: Position is sticky and remains visible on scroll
Active nav link: Visual indicator (blue underline) shows current page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix tablet viewport horizontal scroll issue (17px excess width at 768x1024). Consider adding overflow-x: hidden or investigating why elements are 785px instead of 768px at tablet breakpoint. This is a LOW priority issue as mobile and desktop viewports work perfectly.

success_percentage.frontend_routes: 100% (all routes load correctly with and without trailing slash)
success_percentage.frontend_content: 100% (all required content present on all pages)
success_percentage.frontend_responsive: 75% (mobile, desktop, large desktop perfect; tablet has minor 17px horizontal scroll)
